## Meeting Purpose

[Screening interview for the Account Director role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Candidate Profile:** David McDowell, a Senior Director at Assembly Global, has 10 years of SEO experience across small agencies to Fortune 500 clients.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [**Strategic Success:** McDowell secured buy-in from risk-averse luxury client Chanel for a non-branded SEO strategy by framing it as a hedge against declining branded search interest.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Role Alignment:** The candidate is a strong fit for the new, strategic-only Director role, as he is excited to focus on high-impact strategy and leverage GrowthX's AI platform to solve client content scaling challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [**GrowthX Context:** The company is reorging to shift Directors from account ownership to pure strategy, freeing them to build playbooks and conduct AI search experiments.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's New Director Role & Reorg

  - [**Problem:** Directors were bogged down in production, preventing them from focusing on high-level strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [**Solution:** A reorg shifts Directors out of account ownership into a pure strategic execution role.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**New Director Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
      - [Set client strategy and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=308.0)
      - [Align KPIs with contractual deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
      - [Conduct strategic audits (e.g., technical SEO, content refreshes) via a ticketing system.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Build playbooks to scale successful strategies across the team.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Engagement Managers:** Own client relationships and project management.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
      - [**Content Managers/Editors:** Execute content generation using the AI platform.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

### Candidate Experience & Motivation

  - [**Current Role (Assembly Global):** Senior Director leading SEO for 3 of 4 largest enterprise clients.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Client Work:** Strategy, roadmap, and team oversight; reporting and storytelling.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
      - [**Internal Work:** Manages 3 directors; leads cross-channel collaboration efforts; helps evolve the agency's AI search offering.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Motivation for GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [**Platform:** Excited by the AI platform's ability to solve the client content scaling problem, a key challenge at his current agency.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
      - [**Role:** Seeks a strategic-only position to focus on high-impact thinking, free from day-to-day operations.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)

### Strategic Initiative Example: Chanel

  - [**Challenge:** Secure buy-in from risk-averse luxury client Chanel for a non-branded SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [**Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
    1.  [**Diagnosis:** Identified a major gap in non-branded search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
    2.  [**Framing:** Positioned the strategy as a hedge against declining branded search interest, not a risk.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
    3.  [**Pilot:** Launched a successful 1-year pilot for one business division.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
    4.  [**Scaling:** Used pilot results to secure buy-in from other divisions and the global team.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Execution:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Coordinated internal teams (content, strategy) and an external vendor.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [Managed weekly/bi-weekly syncs to align on research, page development, and post-launch plans.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### Playbook & Process Development

  - [**Reporting Framework:** Built a Looker Studio tool to analyze performance drivers.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Function:** Maps success/decline to specific page/query types.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1594.0)
      - [**Insight:** Distinguishes between performance drops caused by search interest decline, SERP changes (e.g., CTR), or external factors (e.g., paid media).](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [**Metadata Optimization SOP:** Developed a playbook for scaling metadata optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
      - [**Process:** Identify top revenue-driving SKUs → create AI prompts for optimization → launch with client.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

### Q\&A: GrowthX's Challenges & Tools

  - [**Primary Challenge:** Scaling the team to match the rapid pace of technology development.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)
  - [**Director Reorg Rationale:** To free up Directors for strategic thinking, experimentation, and playbook creation, moving them away from production management.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=1894.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [GrowthX uses Scrunch but is aware clients prefer Profound.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=2061.0)
      - [McDowell's agency also uses Scrunch but is considering switching to Profound due to data inconsistencies.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=2150.0)
      - [GrowthX is developing its own tool, "Check That," which leverages its internal AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tucker:** Follow up with David McDowell on next steps (one more screen interview, then a panel).](https://fathom.video/share/nA4swswNv52jXkogGyEdWnPjph_n-tYS?tab=summary&timestamp=2191.0)
